function: () => { document.body.classList.remove('device-disconnected'); document.body.classList.add('device-connected'); document.querySelectorAll('.connected-only').forEach(el => { el.style.setProperty('max-height', 'none', 'important'); el.style.setProperty('opacity', '1', 'important'); el.style.setProperty('pointer-events', 'auto', 'important'); }); const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); panel.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 100, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale', heat: 'HEATING' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { const r2 = panel.getBoundingClientRect(); r({ panelY: r2.top, panelBottom: r2.bottom, classes: panel.className, readout: document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout').textContent, label: document.getElementById('draw-strength-label').textContent, scrollY: window.scrollY }); }, 800)); }
